title: ditassa leonii
intro: Ditassa leonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is a woody climber native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Ditassa leonii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to provide various health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting relaxation.
